title: Force unwrap on spec.protocolName and spec.protocolVersion in loadFile
description: At line 401, self.protocolName! and self.protocolVersion! are force-unwrapped in a Logger.debug call. If the XML file fails to parse or does not contain the expected p7:protocol element with name/version attributes, these properties remain nil and the force unwrap crashes. Since this occurs during spec loading, a corrupted or attacker-modified spec XML file could crash the server at startup.
patch_notes: Replaced force unwraps with nil-coalescing to 'unknown'
